projects.name: Launch Pad
projects.description: Core product launch initiative — onboarding, feature flags, and release pipeline.

projects.name: Ops Board
projects.description: Internal operations dashboard for sprint tracking and incident response.

projects.name: Design System
projects.description: Shared component library — tokens, primitives, and composite patterns.

projects.name: Mobile App
projects.description: React Native companion app for field teams and on-the-go task management.

projects.name: Data Pipeline
projects.description: ETL pipeline for analytics — event ingestion, transformation, and warehouse sync.

projects.name: Archive
projects.description: Legacy project artifacts preserved for reference and compliance.

tasks.title: Design onboarding flow
tasks.description: Create the step-by-step onboarding wizard for new workspace members.

tasks.title: Finalize task filters
tasks.description: Implement status, assignee, and date-range filters on the task list view.

tasks.title: Set up feature flags
tasks.description: Integrate LaunchDarkly SDK and create toggle definitions for beta features.

tasks.title: Write release notes template
tasks.description: Create a reusable markdown template for version release announcements.

tasks.title: Configure CI pipeline
tasks.description: Set up GitHub Actions for lint, test, build, and deploy stages.

tasks.title: Review sprint notes
tasks.description: Compile and distribute sprint retrospective notes to stakeholders.

tasks.title: Prepare project handoff
tasks.description: Document ownership transfer procedures for the operations dashboard.

tasks.title: Build incident tracker widget
tasks.description: Add a real-time incident severity tracker to the ops dashboard.

tasks.title: Create SLA monitoring view
tasks.description: Build a view that tracks SLA compliance for active incidents.

tasks.title: Define color token palette
tasks.description: Establish the base color tokens using OKLCH and semantic naming conventions.

tasks.title: Build Button component
tasks.description: Create primary, secondary, ghost, and danger button variants with proper states.

tasks.title: Build Modal component
tasks.description: Implement accessible modal dialog with backdrop, focus trap, and animations.

tasks.title: Document spacing scale
tasks.description: Write guidelines for the 4px base spacing scale across all components.

tasks.title: Scaffold React Native project
tasks.description: Initialize the Expo project with TypeScript, navigation, and basic screens.

tasks.title: Design mobile task card
tasks.description: Create a compact task card component optimized for mobile viewports.

tasks.title: Implement push notifications
tasks.description: Integrate Expo Notifications for task assignment and deadline alerts.

tasks.title: Design ETL schema
tasks.description: Define the extraction, transformation, and loading schema for event data.

tasks.title: Set up Airflow DAGs
tasks.description: Configure Apache Airflow directed acyclic graphs for scheduled pipeline runs.

tasks.title: Migrate legacy docs
tasks.description: Transfer all documentation from the legacy Wiki to the new knowledge base.

tasks.title: Archive old repositories
tasks.description: Set deprecated GitHub repositories to archived status with final READMEs.
